name: FARMERS & MERCHANTS BANCORP
business: Farmers & Merchants Bancorp is a bank holding company for Farmers & Merchants Bank of Central California, providing commercial and retail banking services including loans, deposits, and other financial services to individuals and businesses primarily in California.

exposures.sentence: The increases in net charge-offs, the provision for credit losses, and the allowance for credit losses reflected the ongoing economic stress in certain agricultural sectors.

catalysts.event: Share repurchase program extended through December 31, 2027
catalysts.sentence: On August 14, 2025, the Board of Directors authorized an increase of $45.0 million to the existing share repurchase program along with an extension of the program through December 31, 2027.

catalysts.event: Shareholder Rights Plan extended to August 5, 2034
catalysts.sentence: The Amended Rights Agreement extends the expiration date of the Company's Rights Plan from the close of business on August 5, 2025, to the close of business on August 5, 2034.
